description: This source file defines the MfaChallenge entity class for a Spring Boot application, representing MFA OTP challenges stored in a database with JPA annotations.

classes.name: MfaChallenge
classes.description: Entity class representing MFA challenge info with fields for UUID, user reference, OTP hash, expiration, consumption, and creation timestamps.

methods.name: MfaChallenge
methods.description: Default constructor for the MFA challenge entity.
